title: hv.drunk

messages.description: generate and output next random number

body: A random walk (drunk) is a special case of a Markov chain, in which the states are integers and the transitions add or subtract a small amount (or zero) from the previous state to get a new one. Here the "f" holds the state. When it gets a bang, the previous state is added to a random number (from 0 to $bound) multiplied by a random sign (-1 or 1). The new value is then coerced into the range from 0 to $bound
